/usr/bin/c++ -m64 -g -m64 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fleaux_core_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fleaux_core_tests.dir/tests/diagnostics_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fleaux_core_tests.dir/tests/parser_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fleaux_core_tests.dir/tests/lowering_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fleaux_core_tests.dir/tests/transpiler_tests.cpp.o -o fleaux_core_tests   -L/home/matthew/.conan2/p/b/catchf9ac63a49d1dc/p/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/matthew/.conan2/p/b/catchf9ac63a49d1dc/p/lib libfleaux_frontend_diagnostics.a libfleaux_frontend_parser.a libfleaux_frontend_lowering.a libfleaux_frontend_cpp_transpiler.a /home/matthew/.conan2/p/b/catchf9ac63a49d1dc/p/lib/libCatch2Maind.a -lm /home/matthew/.conan2/p/b/catchf9ac63a49d1dc/p/lib/libCatch2d.a libfleaux_frontend_lowering.a libfleaux_frontend_parser.a libfleaux_frontend_diagnostics.a
